entities.name: HYDROLOGICAL MONITORING
entities.description: The process of monitoring water movement and distribution to design agricultural water management interventions

entities.name: AGRICULTURAL WATER MANAGEMENT
entities.description: Interventions designed to manage water resources in agricultural systems

entities.name: SOIL HYDRAULIC PROPERTIES
entities.description: Physical characteristics of soil that govern the movement of water

entities.name: ALFISOLS
entities.description: A soil order characterized by specific properties, used in the study to analyze runoff and soil loss

entities.name: VERTISOLS
entities.description: A soil order characterized by high shrink-swell clay content, used in the study to analyze runoff and soil loss

entities.name: RAINFALL-RUNOFF-SOIL LOSS RELATIONSHIPS
entities.description: The correlation between rainfall events, the resulting surface runoff, and the amount of soil lost

entities.name: LANDFORM MANAGEMENT TECHNIQUES
entities.description: Methods used to modify the land surface to manage water and soil

entities.name: RAISED BED
entities.description: A landform management technique involving the creation of elevated beds

entities.name: FLAT BED
entities.description: A landform management technique involving level planting surfaces

entities.name: SURFACE RUNOFF
entities.description: The flow of water that occurs when excess stormwater runs off the land surface

entities.name: SOIL LOSS
entities.description: The displacement of the upper layer of soil, typically due to erosion

entities.name: INFILTRATION TESTS
entities.description: Tests performed to determine the rate at which water enters the soil

entities.name: TENSION DISC INFILTROMETER
entities.description: An instrument used to conduct infiltration tests by applying suction
